info.description: Radio call manager API — real-time audio streaming, call management, and admin CRUD.
info.title: OpenScanner API

get.description: Returns call counts bucketed by hour for the last 24 hours.
Returns call counts (today, this week, total), active listeners, and server uptime.
Returns the top 10 talkgroups by call count over the last 24 hours.
Returns all API keys.

post.description: Creates a new API key and returns the plain-text key once.

put.description: Updates the display order of multiple API keys in one transaction.
Updates an existing API key by ID.

delete.description: Deletes an API key by ID.

get.description: Returns every configuration key-value pair.

put.description: Upserts one or more configuration key-value pairs and broadcasts CFG to WebSocket clients.

get.description: Returns all directory monitors.

post.description: Creates a new directory watch.

put.description: Updates an existing directory monitor by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a directory monitor by ID.

get.description: Returns all downstream push targets.

post.description: Creates a new downstream push target.

put.description: Updates an existing downstream push target by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a downstream push target by ID.

get.description: Returns the entire server configuration as a JSON download. Sensitive fields (API key hashes, downstream API keys, webhook secrets) are excluded.
Downloads a CSV file of all talkgroups for the given system. Accepts an optional system_id query param; if omitted, all systems are exported.
Downloads a CSV file of all units for the given system. Accepts an optional system_id query param; if omitted, all systems are exported.
Returns immediate child directories for a given absolute server path.
Returns all groups.

post.description: Creates a new group.

put.description: Updates an existing group by ID.

post.description: Imports settings, groups, tags, systems, talkgroups, units, API keys, dirmonitors, downstreams, and webhooks from a JSON body. Existing records are upserted or skipped on conflict.

Accepts a multipart CSV file with talkgroup data and a system_id form field. Columns: talkgroup_id, label, name, tag_id, group_id, frequency, led, order. Header rows are auto-skipped. Use mode=overwrite (default) to update existing talkgroups or mode=skip to leave existing talkgroups unchanged.

parameters.description: System ID to import talkgroups into
parameters.name: system_id

post.description: Accepts a multipart CSV file with unit data and a system_id form field. Columns: unit_id, label, order. Header rows are auto-skipped. Use mode=overwrite (default) to update existing units or mode=skip to leave existing units unchanged.

parameters.description: System ID to import units into
parameters.name: system_id

get.description: Returns log entries within an optional date range and level filter. Results are capped at 10,000 rows (X-Truncated header set when truncated).

parameters.description: Log level filter (e.g. INFO, WARN, ERROR)
parameters.name: level

post.description: Apply previously previewed RadioReference talkgroup enrichment candidates. Supports fill_missing (default) and overwrite_selected merge modes with per-field toggles. Frequency is never updated.

Upload a RadioReference CSV export and preview which local talkgroups would be enriched. Frequency is never updated. Columns: talkgroup id (decimal/tgid), alpha tag, description, group/category, tag/service type, led, order.

parameters.description: Local system ID to match talkgroups against
parameters.name: system_id

get.description: Returns all shared links with associated call metadata.

delete.description: Removes a shared link by its ID.

get.description: Returns all systems.

post.description: Creates a new radio system.

put.description: Updates the display order of multiple systems in a single transaction.
Updates an existing system by ID.

get.description: Returns all tags.

post.description: Creates a new tag.

put.description: Updates an existing tag by ID.

get.description: Returns all talkgroups.

post.description: Creates a new talkgroup.

put.description: Updates an existing talkgroup by ID.

get.description: Paginates through stored calls and returns those whose audio file is missing from disk.
get.summary: List calls with missing audio files

post.description: Deletes call database rows for the given call IDs, but only if their audio file is still missing on disk at delete time. Requires confirm=true.
post.summary: Clean up calls with missing audio

get.description: Returns all units, optionally filtered by system_id and/or unit_id pattern.

post.description: Creates a new unit.

put.description: Updates an existing unit by ID.

get.description: Returns all users.

post.description: Creates a new user account.

put.description: Updates an existing user by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a user by ID. Cannot delete your own account or the primary admin.

get.description: Returns all webhooks.

post.description: Creates a new webhook.

put.description: Updates an existing webhook by ID.

post.description: Authenticate with username and password, returns a JWT token.
Revoke the current JWT token.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile.

put.description: Change the current user's password. Requires the current password for verification.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's disabled talkgroup IDs.

put.description: Save the authenticated user's disabled talkgroup IDs.

get.description: Returns an array of call IDs that the authenticated user has bookmarked.

post.description: Creates a bookmark if one does not exist for the given call and user, or removes it if it already exists.

get.description: Returns full call details for all calls bookmarked by the authenticated user.

post.description: Ingest a radio call with audio and metadata. Requires a valid API key.

parameters.description: JSON array of patched talkgroup IDs
parameters.name: patches

get.description: Paginated search of the call archive with optional filters.
Stream the audio file for a specific call. Requires authentication or public access mode.
Returns the share token for a call if it exists, for authenticated users.

post.description: Creates a shared_links record for the call and returns the token + URL.

delete.description: Removes the shared_links record. Only the original sharer or an admin can unshare.

get.description: Returns server status and version for readiness probes and Docker HEALTHCHECK.

post.description: Creates the initial admin user and marks setup as complete. Returns 409 if setup is already done, 400 for invalid input.

get.description: Returns whether initial setup is needed and whether public access is active. Always unauthenticated.
Returns call metadata as JSON for public viewing. No authentication required.
Serves the audio file for a shared call. No authentication required.

APIKeyAuth.description: API key for call upload endpoints
APIKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key

BearerAuth.description: Paste the value exactly as copied (already includes Bearer prefix)
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
